[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01011100 4
1 10001001 3
2 00110011 4
3 00011001 3
4 00000100 1
5 00001100 2
6 11101000 4
7 00000111 3

23 32 11101100 5

70 07 00111011 5
